name: TLS 1.0 Enabled
description: Server accepts TLS 1.0 connections which have known vulnerabilities (BEAST, POODLE).
remediation: Disable TLS 1.0. Require TLS 1.2 minimum, TLS 1.3 preferred.

name: TLS 1.1 Enabled
description: Server accepts TLS 1.1 which is deprecated.

name: Self-Signed Certificate
description: The certificate is self-signed and not trusted by browsers.
remediation: Replace with a certificate from a trusted Certificate Authority.

name: Permissive CORS with Credentials
description: CORS policy reflects arbitrary origin with credentials allowed.
remediation: Restrict Access-Control-Allow-Origin to specific trusted origins.

name: Publicly Exposed Database Port
description: A database service port is reachable from the internet.
remediation: Restrict database ports to internal networks via firewall rules.

name: Git Repository Exposed
description: .git directory is publicly accessible, potentially exposing source code and secrets.
remediation: Block access to .git via web server config (deny from all).
